filter.description: An expression that defines the filter to apply across create/update events of findings. While creating a filter string, be mindful of the scope in which the mute configuration is being created. E.g., If a filter contains project = X but is created under the project = Y scope, it might not match any findings.

type.description: The type of the mute config.

mute_config_id.description: Unique identifier provided by the client within the parent scope.

description.description: A description of the mute config.

location.description: location Id is provided by project. If not provided, Use global as default.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
